verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The judge failed to utilize the multi-agent pipeline. The linguistic agent provided a definitive, image-grounded proof (Thai script) in the first round. The judge should have asked the linguistic agent to confirm the text or asked the regulatory agent to confirm the driving side to rule out Laos. Instead, the judge skipped discussion entirely and made a final decision based on the initial assessment.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The final reasoning correctly identified the Thai script as the definitive marker and synthesized the supporting evidence from other agents. However, the synthesis was superficial as it did not incorporate any new information from a discussion phase.
